---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Why does the current state fall short?

## Proposed solution

How would you like it to work? UI sketches, API shape, config keys — anything
concrete helps.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why they didn't fit.

## Additional context

Screenshots, related tools, prior art, etc.
